description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular two-story structure with a steeply pitched red gable roof that overhangs the walls. The front facade displays two large blue-tinted windows on the upper floor and two matching windows on the lower floor, alongside a single brown door. The walls are a light beige color, with brown trim accentuating the windows and door. The side and rear views show plain, unadorned walls with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the focus on the front elevation. The roof is constructed from what appears to be corrugated or ribbed material, giving it a distinct texture. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a straightforward geometric form.
description: A two-story beige house with a steep red gable roof, large blue windows, and a single brown door on the front facade. The design is simple and modern, with minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large blue windows on each floor and a brown door, all framed with brown trim beneath a prominent red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the overhanging red roof and plain beige wall, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a plain beige wall and the lower edge of the red gable roof, with no openings or architectural details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the overhanging red roof and a featureless beige wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Single brown door with rectangular design, no porch or steps, framed by brown trim and set beneath the roof overhang.
